markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content production workflow, calendar, and new blog wireframes.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Reporting Structure:** The team now reports to Jason Ford (Consumer Team), with Justin as the primary contact for day-to-day approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [**Airtable Workflow Adopted:** A new Airtable calendar will manage the full content lifecycle (topic approval → production → review → publication), enabling the 5 articles/week goal.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Image Creation Centralized:** All hero images must be created by the Udemy Design team via a formal ticket process, requiring a 1–2 week lead time.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**New Blog Wireframes Approved:** The wireframes were approved, with a key decision to launch the new blog on the current domain to avoid delaying content publication.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)

## Topics

### New Reporting Structure

  - [The team now reports to Jason Ford (Consumer Team), not Glenn.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [**Operational Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [**Day-to-day approvals:** Justin](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [**Strategic input:** Jason Ford](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

### Content Production Workflow

  - [**Goal:** Publish 5 articles/week to generate performance signals quickly.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [**Airtable Calendar:** Katya demoed a new calendar to manage the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Topic Approval:** Justin approves topics/keywords monthly.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
      - [**Production & Review:** A simplified view tracks articles.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
      - [**Publication:** Justin updates the status to "publish" to trigger GrowthX's Looker dashboard updates.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Content delivered Friday → Udemy team reviews early next week → Revisions applied → Publication the following week.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This cadence allows for thorough review, which is critical for a new partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [**Pillar Page Collaboration:**](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Getting input from busy senior authors.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
      - [**Solution:** Authors can submit Loom videos or voice notes with feedback, which GrowthX will integrate into the article.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)

### Image Creation Process

  - [**Process:** All hero images must be created by the Udemy Design team via a formal ticket.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [**Lead Time:** 2 weeks (ideal), 1 week (last resort).](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensures brand consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**GrowthX Proposal:** Explore a template-based system to accelerate the process.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)

### New Blog Wireframes

  - [**Approval:** The wireframes were approved, drawing inspiration from the Mixpanel blog.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [**Key Decisions:**](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
      - [**URL Structure:** `/categories/` folder will be added for better analytics filtering.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
      - [**Navigation:** Topic clusters will appear at the top of the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
      - [**Infinite Scroll:** Confirmed over pagination to mirror the Consumer blog's UX.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
      - [**Featured Article:** Removed for simplicity; Justin will confirm this with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
      - [**Internal Links:** The "Related Articles" section will have a manual override option for strategic linking.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [**Launch Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
      - [**Decision:** Launch the new blog on the current domain immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Avoids delaying content publication while awaiting a larger site migration.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
      - [**Action:** Justin will confirm with Krista that this launch strategy won't negatively impact existing lead-gen content.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
      - [Deliver revised calibration articles by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
      - [Schedule a wireframe walkthrough with the Udemy dev/design team.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [**Justin:**](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
      - [Confirm the "no featured article" decision with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
      - [Confirm the launch strategy (new blog on current domain) with Krista.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
      - [Discuss the publishing workflow with Jay.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
      - [Follow up with IT on the GA4 setup.](https://fathom.video/share/1iX1pXRxsKUxz7_a8nUcWLSBxQYDtVse?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
